Why Midoj

Travel that feels like home.
Ownership that grows with you.

01
Real legal ownership

Not a timeshare. Not a booking. You receive LLP units in a dedicated SPV — actual co-ownership of property and land, documented and transferable.

02
Stay anywhere in our network

Invest in one home. Access all of them. Your 10–20 nights per year are redeemable across every Midoj property across India.

03
Country Club membership

Founding investors receive 5 or 10 years of Country Club membership — resort access across India, beyond just our own network.

04
A legacy for your children

Your investment is not an expense. It is an asset that grows, a lifestyle that endures, and a second home your children can inherit.

05
Zero maintenance burden

We manage everything — housekeeping, bookings, hospitality. You own it. We run it. You arrive and feel at home.

06
India's underexplored destinations

Loktak Lake. Malpe Beach. We build in places before they're discovered — giving early owners the most to gain.

Who Midoj is For

Every journey is different.
Every traveller belongs.

Whether you're leaving the city for peace or arriving in it for purpose — Midoj is your home at both ends.

Metro Dwellers
Escape without losing comfort

Professionals and families in Tier 1 cities who want to explore mountains, coasts, and remote destinations — without giving up the quality they're used to.

"Work from Coorg. Holiday in Udupi. Own both."

City Visitors
Feel secure when you travel

People from Tier 2 and 3 cities, towns and villages who travel to metros for work, study, or family — and want to arrive somewhere that feels like home.

"Step into a city. Step into your home."

Families
Travel freely and meaningfully

Families who want to travel together safely — knowing every Midoj home across India is fully serviced, consistent, and truly theirs to enjoy.

"Every destination becomes familiar."

Investors
An asset that pays in experiences

Those who understand that real estate is the most durable store of value — and want a smarter, more joyful way to hold it.

"Ownership that earns rest and returns."

"What if every journey felt like coming home?
What if no place ever felt unfamiliar again?"

— The Midoj Vision

Our Story

Born from a simple
yet powerful idea.

What if every journey felt like coming home? That question became Midoj.

The meaning behind the name
Mi Dos Journey

Spanish for "My Second Journey" — because life isn't just about where you start. It's about every place you discover along the way.

The Problem We Saw

The model was broken.

For years, travel has meant temporary stays, unfamiliar spaces, and a lack of true comfort. Owning a second home meant huge capital investment and years of maintenance headaches.

Most Indians earn enough to dream of a second home. Very few ever own one. Not because they lack ambition — but because no one built the right model.

Until now.

The Vision

Connecting India, one home at a time.

We are building more than properties. We are building a connected lifestyle ecosystem across India.

Where someone from a village can walk into a city and feel at home. Where someone from a busy metro can escape into peace without losing comfort.

Where families can travel freely, safely, and meaningfully. Where every destination becomes familiar.

A Legacy Beyond Travel

Midoj is not just about today.
It's about generations.

Your investment is not an expense — it's an asset that grows with time and a lifestyle that your children can inherit. A second home. A second life. A second journey.

Begin Your Journey
Our Values

What we stand for

🏡
Belonging over booking

You're not a guest. You're not a customer. You belong. Every Midoj home should feel like it was built for you.

⚖️
Real ownership

We believe in the sanctity of ownership. LLP structures, legal documentation, land titles included. No shortcuts.

🌏
India, undiscovered

We build in places before the crowds arrive — so our members benefit most from appreciation and authenticity.

🔗
Connection over transaction

Travel should bridge India's many worlds. Midoj connects cities to villages, metros to mountains, work to rest.

How It Works

Simple to understand.
Powerful to own.

Fractional real estate is a new concept for India — so we've made it as clear as possible.

The Process

Your journey to ownership

01

Choose your tier

Select the Midoj Explorer plan (₹2,99,999 / 10 nights per year) or the Midoj Signature plan (₹5,99,999 / 20 nights per year) — and the property that speaks to you.

02

Join the LLP (SPV)

Each Midoj property has its own Special Purpose Vehicle — a Limited Liability Partnership. You receive LLP units proportional to your investment. This is your legal co-ownership of both the property and the land beneath it.

03

Get Country Club membership

Founding investors receive 5 or 10 years of Country Club membership. This means resort access across India — beyond just Midoj properties — from day one.

04

Book your nights — anywhere

Your 10–20 nights per year are redeemable across our entire network of Midoj Service Homes. Not just the property you invested in — all of them. Priority booking windows are given based on shareholding.

05

Earn when you don't use it

Unused nights can be rented through our hospitality management system. Revenue is shared transparently with all LLP members based on their stake.

06

Pass it on — or exit

Your LLP units are transferable and inheritable. Sell privately or through our resale network. The asset is yours, legally and permanently.

Questions We Hear

Honest answers

Q

Is this a timeshare?

No. A timeshare gives you usage rights — you own nothing. With Midoj, you receive LLP units: actual legal co-ownership of property and land, with your name in the agreement. You can sell, transfer, or inherit your stake.

Q

What if I want to sell my share?

Your LLP units are transferable. You can sell to another investor through our resale network or privately. We're building a secondary marketplace for members.

Q

What if construction is delayed?

Your investment goes into the LLP which owns the land. Even in a worst-case scenario, the land asset holds value. We share quarterly construction milestone updates with all investors.

Q

Can I get rental income too?

Yes. You can lease your unused allocated nights/stays through our Members' platform. Revenue is directly transferred to your account after deducting a nominal service fee.

Project One

Imphal Midoj

"India's best-kept secret — before it's discovered."

Imphal is Northeast India's gateway — Loktak Lake, Kangla Fort, living root bridges, cultural richness that India is only beginning to discover. Direct flights from Delhi, Kolkata, Guwahati.

Zero mass tourism. Strong appreciation potential. The early movers in undiscovered destinations always benefit the most.

💰 Earn back 70–80% of your investment

Lease your 10 annual nights for 5 years while you enjoy Country Club access. 10 nights × 5 years = 50 nights, leased at ₹5,000/night = ₹2,50,000 earned back — that's over 80% of your investment returned, while you still own the asset.

💰 Earn back 70–80% of your investment

Lease your 20 annual nights for 5 years while you enjoy 10 years of Country Club access. 20 nights × 5 years = 100 nights, leased at ₹5,000/night = ₹5,00,000 earned back — nearly your full investment returned, while retaining lifetime ownership and 5 more years of Country Club.

Our Expansion Vision

A home in every corner
of India and beyond.

We're starting small and building deliberately — one destination at a time, ensuring every Midoj home meets our standard before we expand.

01
Phase 1 — Now Launching
Imphal & Udupi
Northeast India's hidden gem and Karnataka's unspoiled coastline — our founding two projects where the Midoj journey begins.
02
Phase 2
Guwahati · Delhi · Bangalore · Rishikesh
Expanding to major metros and spiritual retreats — giving Midoj members a home in India's busiest cities and most peaceful sanctuaries.
03
Phase 3
Goa · Kerala & Other Tourist Destinations
India's most beloved holiday destinations — where Midoj members will have a home instead of a hotel booking.
04
Phase 4
Other Cities & Activity Centres
Tier 2 & Tier 3 cities, adventure hubs, wellness centres — building India's most complete second-home network.
05
Phase 5 — The Dream
International Destinations
A Midoj home beyond India's borders — making every journey, anywhere in the world, feel like coming home.
